testcase.name: TC-001: Verify DOCA-OFED happy path installs packages and loads kernel modules
TC-006: Verify DOCA-OFED fails gracefully when repository is unreachable
TC-007: Verify UDEV rules correctly rename InfiniBand interfaces
TC-004: Verify network interface IP allocation from pool
TC-008: Verify MTU auto-detection assigns 4092 for IB and 9000 for RoCE
TC-009: Verify manual IP override takes precedence over pool allocation
TC-002: Verify RoCE NIC auto-detection correctly identifies IB vs RoCE mode
TC-003: Verify PFC/ETS configured correctly for lossless RoCE
TC-010: Verify roce_lossless disabled skips all configuration
TC-011: Verify mlnx_qos not found fails with clear error message
TC-012: Verify RoCE validation detects ToS mismatch
TC-013: Verify boot persistence service applies settings after reboot
TC-014: Verify InfiniBand mode skips PFC/ETS and only configures ToS
TC-016: Verify ETS bandwidth allocation enforcement by mlnx_qos
TC-019: Verify DSCP/PCP graceful degradation when not supported by firmware
TC-005: Verify perf tuning sysctl values applied for 400Gbit throughput
TC-015: Verify kernel boot parameters include mitigations-off flags
TC-018: Verify NVMe tuning applied to all NVMe devices
TC-020: Verify TuneD profile throughput-performance active after playbook
TC-017: Verify idempotency - run all 4 roles twice with no drift
